description:
Recto: Fragment from the lower left corner of a legal document in Arabic script. Mentions the date Dhū l-Ḥijja [.]75 AH, likely 575 AH based on the overall appearance, but could be 475 or 675. Involves Hibatallāh al-Yahūdī. 

Verso: Fragment from a letter in Arabic script. Seems to say that "we owe 40,000(!?) dinars... and you know the state of Abū ʿImrān with a single dirham... that I relax from the state I am in..." Then mentions 7 dinars. Needs examination.
